has_indexable_routes.q: Does the site have ≥2 indexable routes (blog, docs, or marketing pages beyond a single LP)?

gsc_access.q: Is Google Search Console connected or verifiable (sitemap submitted)?

competitor_clarity.q: Can you name 3 real competitors with verifiable positioning differences?

content_capacity.q: Can you ship 3–5 quality pages in 14 days (founder + 1 writer or heavy AI-assist with review)?

cluster_ready.q: Is one commercial-intent cluster chosen (alternatives / vs / how-to for ICP job)?
